summary: Planned conservative inventory classifications for five open pull requests. The job is not a dedupe cluster, no shared canonical was provided, security preflight found no security-sensitive items, and close/merge/fix actions are not appropriate from the hydrated evidence.

actions.reason: Open contributor PR with a distinct package/runtime-facade fix path; keep it independent for maintainer review rather than closing or merging in this plan-only inventory shard.
Open contributor PR with a distinct compaction timeout/session-state fix; keep it independent for maintainer review rather than closing or merging in this plan-only inventory shard.

Open PR has a distinct gateway reload behavior change but lacks passing real behavior proof, so the conservative inventory action is to keep it independent and leave proof/technical judgment to the normal PR review path.

Open contributor PR with useful provider-compatibility work and unresolved maintainer/technical review context; keep it independent rather than closing or treating it as a merge candidate in this plan-only shard.
Open small docs PR with distinct scope and no duplicate/superseded evidence; keep it independent for normal maintainer review.
